query:
SELECT 'vehicle_makes' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM vehicle_makes
UNION ALL SELECT 'vehicle_models', COUNT(*) FROM vehicle_models
UNION ALL SELECT 'part_categories', COUNT(*) FROM part_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'part_groups', COUNT(*) FROM part_groups
UNION ALL SELECT 'line_codes', COUNT(*) FROM line_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'parts', COUNT(*) FROM parts
UNION ALL SELECT 'part_vehicle_fitments', COUNT(*) FROM part_vehicle_fitments;

UNION ALL SELECT 'line_codes', COUNT(*) FROM line_codes
